title: metrosideros sclerocarpa
intro: Metrosideros sclerocarpa, also known as the red rimu, is a species of flowering plant in the myrtle family, native to New Zealand. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Metrosideros sclerocarpa include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, are made by infusing the leaves and bark in hot water or a solvent, and are used to harness its medicinal properties.
